---
title: "FinalPaper"
format: pdf 
---

# Introduction 

# Methods 

# Results 

![Figure 1](../images/species-richness-time.png)

![Figure 2](../images/species-perc-cover-time.png)

![Figure 3](../images/native-non-native-percover.png)

![Figure 4](../images/barpALL.png)
![Figure 5](../images/barpSELECTED.png)
![Figure 6](../images/foursppkey.png)


# Discussion 

# References
